title: Process Engineer Vacancy at JK Tyre - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at JK Tyre - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Process Engineer looking for your next big career move? JK Tyre in Chennai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About JK Tyre:
JK Tyre is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with JK Tyre!
